turns.content: I'd like to return an item please.
I can help with that. Do you have the order ID and the SKU of the item you'd like to return? I'll also need to know the reason for the return.
The order ID is ORD-10031. The reason for the return is that the backpack is too small and doesn't fit my gear.

Your return for the Hiking Backpack from order ORD-10031 has been created. Your return ID is RET-2350AC.

You can find your shipping label here: https://shipping.example.com/labels/RET-2350AC

Please pack the item securely and drop it off at any shipping location.
